final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 nine-grid poster for 小红书 (RED), designed to be cut into 9 individual square cards after export.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, ins-style 治愈感 aesthetic with lightweight skeuomorphic illustration accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid layout; each cell is self-contained and centered; visible cell borders or gutters between every cell to allow clean post-crop; no title or body text placed near any grid boundary
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with the following content:

  格1（封面）:
    大标题：「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」
    副标题：「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」
    插画元素：柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩

  格2:
    标题：「1. 睡前1小时别玩手机」
    正文：「蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。」
    插画元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情小插画

  格3:
    标题：「2. 睡前把灯光调暗」
    正文：「暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。」
    插画元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘

  格4:
    标题：「3. 房间温度别太高」
    正文：「稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。」
    插画元素：空调、温度计、被子

  格5:
    标题：「4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡」
    正文：「咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。」
    插画元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号

  格6:
    标题：「5. 睡前洗个热水澡」
    正文：「能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。」
    插画元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水

  格7:
    标题：「6. 脑子停不下来就写下来」
    正文：「把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。」
    插画元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯

  格8:
    标题：「7. 固定上床时间」
    正文：「每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。」
    插画元素：时钟、月亮、床

  格9:
    标题：「8. 试试深呼吸放松法」
    正文：「吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。」
    底部小字：「收藏这组，今晚试试看」
    插画元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星

Scene/backdrop: needs a sleep-wellness / 睡眠疗愈 atmosphere across all cells — exact backdrop treatment per cell is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, calming night-time mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be 奶油白 / 浅米色 / 淡燕麦色 / 浅焦糖色 as dominant tones, with deep-brown text accents and minimal warm highlights
Materials/textures: needs a light, airy surface feel with gentle illustration texture — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as listed per cell above; must include 格1 大标题「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」, 副标题「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」; must include 格9 底部小字「收藏这组，今晚试试看」; all in-image text must be Chinese only, no English, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve all 9 cells fully populated; each cell must read as an independent 小红书 card; grid lines / gutters must be clearly visible for clean cutting; all text must be large, legible, and centered within its cell — never crossing cell boundaries; overall poster ratio must be 3:4
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing feel, excessive decoration, English text, garbled characters, text overlapping grid boundaries, any cell appearing empty or incomplete
